description_for_human: Look up CVE vulnerability details from the NIST National Vulnerability Database (NVD). Retrieve severity scores, CVSS ratings, affected products, and descriptions for any CVE identifier.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve detailed vulnerability information from the NIST National Vulnerability Database (NVD). Invoke this plugin when the user asks about: a specific CVE identifier (e.g. CVE-2024-21413, CVE-2021-44228), the severity or CVSS score of a vulnerability, vulnerabilities affecting a specific product or vendor, recent critical or high severity CVEs, or whether a specific vulnerability has been patched or is actively exploited. The plugin can look up a CVE by exact ID, search CVEs by keyword such as product name or vulnerability type, and filter by severity level (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW).
